title: caladenia occidentalis
intro: Caladenia occidentalis, also known as the Western Greenhood, is a species of orchid native to Western Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Caladenia occidentalis include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. Herbal preparations of Caladenia occidentalis typically involve the use of its roots, which can be dried and made into a tea or tincture for consumption.
